intelligence.raw_jd:
Job Description: Human Resources (HR) Executive
Role Overview
The HR Executive is responsible for managing end-to-end human resource functions including recruitment, employee relations, performance management, compliance, and organizational development. This role ensures a positive work environment while aligning HR practices with business goals.
Key Responsibilities
	•	Handle end-to-end recruitment and onboarding processes
	•	Maintain and update employee records, HR databases, and documentation
	•	Support performance appraisal and employee development initiatives
	•	Manage attendance, leave, and payroll coordination
	•	Address employee queries, grievances, and promote a healthy work culture
	•	Ensure compliance with company policies and labor laws
	•	Assist in HR audits, reports, and MIS
	•	Organize employee engagement activities and training programs
Required Skills & Qualifications
	•	Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field
	•	1–3 years of experience in an HR role (freshers can be considered for junior roles)
	•	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	•	Knowledge of HR processes, policies, and basic labor laws
	•	Proficiency in MS Office / HRMS tools
	•	Ability to maintain confidentiality and professionalism
Preferred Attributes
	•	Problem-solving mindset
	•	Strong organizational and time management skills
	•	Positive attitude with a people-first approach
Department
Human Resources (HR)
Reporting To
HR Manager / HR Lead

intelligence.raw_jd:
Job Title: Data Analyst
Location: Hybrid / Onsite
Experience: 2–4 Years
Job Summary
We are looking for a detail-oriented Data Analyst who can collect, analyze, and interpret large datasets to support business decision-making. The ideal candidate will have strong analytical skills, experience with SQL and Python, and the ability to translate data insights into actionable recommendations.
Key Responsibilities
	•	Collect, clean, and analyze structured and unstructured data from multiple sources
	•	Write complex SQL queries to extract and manipulate data
	•	Perform data analysis using Python (Pandas, NumPy)
	•	Create interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI / Tableau
	•	Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies to support business strategies
	•	Work closely with stakeholders to understand business requirements
	•	Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and integrity
	•	Present insights and findings to non-technical teams
Required Skills & Qualifications
	•	Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or related field
	•	2–4 years of experience as a Data Analyst
	•	Strong proficiency in SQL
	•	Hands-on experience with Python for data analysis
	•	Experience with Power BI or Tableau
	•	Solid understanding of data cleaning, data modeling, and data visualization
	•	Strong problem-solving and communication skills
Preferred Skills
	•	Experience with Excel (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, formulas)
	•	Basic knowledge of statistics
	•	Experience working with large datasets

intelligence.raw_jd:
Job Description – Software Engineer (Backend)

Job Title: Software Engineer (Backend)
Location: Remote / Hybrid / On-site
Experience: 2–5 Years
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary:
We are seeking a skilled Backend Software Engineer to design, develop, and maintain scalable server-side applications. The candidate should have strong problem-solving skills and experience building reliable backend systems.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design and develop backend services and RESTful APIs
• Build scalable and secure server-side applications
• Work with SQL and NoSQL databases
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize performance and ensure system reliability
• Collaborate with frontend, DevOps, and product teams
• Debug and resolve production issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Proficiency in Python / Java / Node.js
• Experience with backend frameworks (FastAPI, Spring Boot, Express, etc.)
• Strong understanding of REST APIs and microservices
• Hands-on experience with databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB)
• Familiarity with Git and version control
• Knowledge of authentication and security best practices

Preferred Qualifications:
• Experience with cloud platforms (AWS / Azure / GCP)
• Knowledge of Docker and containerization
• Exposure to CI/CD pipelines
• Experience working in Agile environments

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary
• Flexible work environment
• Career growth opportunities
• Collaborative team culture

Supriya Bahubali Chougale
📍 India
📧 supriya.chougale@email.com
📞 +91-XXXXXXXXXX
🔗 LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/supriyachougale

Professional Summary
Detail-oriented and people-focused HR Executive with hands-on experience in end-to-end recruitment, onboarding, employee relations, HR operations, and compliance. Proven ability to maintain accurate HR records, support performance management processes, and foster a positive work culture aligned with organizational goals.

Core HR Skills
	•	End-to-End Recruitment & Onboarding
	•	Employee Relations & Engagement
	•	HR Operations & Documentation
	•	Performance Management Support
	•	Attendance, Leave & Payroll Coordination
	•	HR Policies & Labor Law Compliance
	•	MIS Reporting & HR Audits
	•	HRMS & MS Office Tools

Professional Experience
HR Executive
ABC Technologies Pvt. Ltd. | June 2023 – Present
	•	Managed end-to-end recruitment including sourcing, screening, interview coordination, and offer rollouts
	•	Handled joining formalities and onboarding to ensure smooth employee integration
	•	Maintained accurate employee records, HR databases, and documentation
	•	Coordinated with finance team for payroll processing, attendance, and leave management
	•	Assisted in performance appraisal cycles and employee feedback documentation
	•	Actively addressed employee queries and grievances, ensuring timely resolution
	•	Ensured compliance with company policies and applicable labor laws
	•	Prepared HR MIS reports, audit data, and monthly dashboards
	•	Organized employee engagement activities, training sessions, and internal events

HR Intern
XYZ Solutions | Jan 2023 – May 2023
	•	Supported recruitment activities such as resume screening and interview scheduling
	•	Assisted in maintaining HR files and employee documentation
	•	Helped track attendance and leave records
	•	Participated in onboarding and orientation programs
	•	Assisted HR team with administrative and reporting tasks

Education
Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) – Human Resources
University Name | 2020 – 2023

Technical Skills
	•	MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint
	•	HRMS Tools
	•	Google Workspace
	•	Basic Payroll Systems

Personal Attributes
	•	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	•	High level of confidentiality and professionalism
	•	Organized, proactive, and detail-oriented
	•	Problem-solving mindset with a people-first approach

Declaration
I hereby declare that the information provided above is true and correct to the best of my knowledge.

Date:
Signature: Supriya Bahubali Chougale

Name: Rahul Sharma
Location: Bengaluru, India
Phone: +91-9XXXXXXXXX
Email: rahul.sharma@email.com
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/rahulsharma

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Detail-oriented Data Analyst with 3 years of experience in collecting, cleaning, and analyzing large datasets to drive business insights. Strong expertise in SQL, Python (Pandas, NumPy), and Power BI, with proven ability to present actionable insights to stakeholders.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
	•	Programming: Python (Pandas, NumPy)
	•	Databases: SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL)
	•	Data Visualization: Power BI, Tableau
	•	Data Analysis: Data Cleaning, Data Modeling, Exploratory Data Analysis
	•	Tools: Excel (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, formulas)

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Data Analyst
ABC Technologies Pvt. Ltd. | Bengaluru
June 2022 – Present
	•	Collected, cleaned, and analyzed large datasets from multiple business sources
	•	Developed complex SQL queries to extract and transform data for reporting
	•	Performed data analysis using Python (Pandas, NumPy) to identify trends and patterns
	•	Designed and maintained interactive dashboards using Power BI and Tableau
	•	Worked closely with business stakeholders to gather requirements and deliver insights
	•	Ensured data accuracy, consistency, and integrity across reports
	•	Presented data findings and recommendations to non-technical teams

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
XYZ University | 2018 – 2022

CERTIFICATIONS
	•	Data Analysis with Python
	•	SQL for Data Analytics

KEY ACHIEVEMENTS
	•	Improved reporting efficiency by 30% through automated Power BI dashboards
	•	Supported strategic business decisions by delivering actionable data insights
